data.Title: Security Policy Exception Request
data.Description:
These systems are all running various versions of ESXI that are currently unsupported by Broadcomm.
We are now in the process of migrating these systems to a supported version of Proxmox. This will involve wiping and reprovisioning them, which are in process and occurring this summer and likely through the fall.

Attributes.Name: Hostnames
Attributes.Description: List the hostnames for each asset / server that this policy applies to, separated by newlines.

Attributes.Name: Risk Assessment Justification
Attributes.Value: These systems provide infrastructure for Lerner College operations and curriculum support, as well as some web presence for the college.
Attributes.ValueText: These systems provide infrastructure for Lerner College operations and curriculum support, as well as some web presence for the college.

Attributes.Name: Level of Data
Attributes.ValueText: Level II - Moderate impact: 'official use' information (eg., work emails, internal docs)
Attributes.ChoicesText: Level II - Moderate impact: 'official use' information (eg., work emails, internal docs)

Attributes.Name: Level of Data: Specify
Attributes.Description: Based on the level of data selected, select all examples of which data you are storing. If you don't see that data on this list, try selecting another data level.
Attributes.ValueText: Other information as specified by contractual, legal or other requirements
Attributes.ChoicesText: Other information as specified by contractual, legal or other requirements

Attributes.ValueText: Level II - Moderate impact: 'official use' information (eg., work emails, internal docs)
Attributes.ChoicesText: Level II - Moderate impact: 'official use' information (eg., work emails, internal docs)

Attributes.Name: Allow Vulnerability Scanning Agent on Client?
Does system have access to management network?
Does this machine have a public IP address?
Is the operating system up to date with the latest patch?
How often are OS patches installed?
How often are application patches installed?
How many assets or servers depend on this asset?
How many users are impacted by the services this asset supports?
How important is this asset to the University as a whole?
Impacted Systems, Services and Data
Attributes.Value:
Virtual desktop machines for graduate students to perform research activities (21.100) (Level 2)
Curriculum support services, print services, web servers, virtual desktops for professors for testing curriculum and research software without affecting their PCs - (ntx01, ntx02, ntx03) (Level 2)
Attributes.ValueText:
Virtual desktop machines for graduate students to perform research activities (21.100) (Level 2)
Curriculum support services, print services, web servers, virtual desktops for professors for testing curriculum and research software without affecting their PCs - (ntx01, ntx02, ntx03) (Level 2)

Attributes.Name: Summary of Compensating Information Security Controls
Attributes.Value: Host VMs either have crowdstrike or tenable on them as applicable. Windows VMs are AD bound and only allow access to specific users, and are managed via kace.
Attributes.ValueText: Host VMs either have crowdstrike or tenable on them as applicable. Windows VMs are AD bound and only allow access to specific users, and are managed via kace.

Feeds.Body:
Changed Status from "In Process" to "Closed".

Internal ticket update

The "Close ticket, pending time near end date." IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

Successfully Started IPaaS Flow [439a28bd-8845-4c6d-b9dc-1eef89ff0088]
Evaluated the "This is not a renewal" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were not met.

Approved the "Unit Head Acceptance of Risk" step in the "Security Policy Exception" workflow.

Project proceeding on time
Approved the "SepOps Risk Assessment and Approval of Security Exception Request" step in the "Security Policy Exception" workflow.
Evaluated the "SecOps Exception?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were met.
Evaluated the "IAM Exception?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were not met.

The "Change ticket status to In Process, assign to implementation group" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

The following actions were performed:

No Errors Encountered

Changed Status from "Closed" to "In Process".

Internal ticket update

The "Add 3 months to exception end date" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

The following actions were performed:

No Errors Encountered

Changed Approval Status from "Pending Approval" to "Approved".
Changed Exception End Date from "11/20/2025" to "02/19/2026".
Changed Number of Renewals from "Nothing" to "1".

Selected "Renew for 3 months" for the "Request Security Policy Exception Renewal?" step in the "Security Policy Exception" workflow.

Still working through this. In the process of staging things so that we can migrate these VMs to another node. December looking plausible.

The "Reset Approval Status, if set" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

The following actions were performed:

No Errors Encountered
Changed Approval Status from "Nothing" to "Pending Approval".

Feeds.ItemTitle: This task will wait until 30 days before exception expires
Feeds.Body:
Changed Percent Complete from "0 %" to "100 %".
Closing ticket task, as all conditions have been met.

Changed Hostnames from "10.2.21.100 ntx01-esxi.lerner.udel.edu ntx02-esxi.lerner.udel.edu ntx03-esxi.lerner.udel.edu" to "10.2.21.100 ntx01-esxi.lerner.udel.edu ntx02-esxi.lerner.udel.edu ntx03-esxi.lerner.udel.edu vc.lerner.udel.edu".
Changed IT Security Assessment from "Nothing" to "Firewall rules in place".

Sam's comment 9-17-2025

I don't know if you need me to email this to you, but 10.2.21.100 is no longer running VMWare as of this morning!!
----
Host removed from rules for exception due to migration to proxmox

Changed Status from "In Process" to "Closed".

Internal ticket update

The "Close ticket, pending time near end date." IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

Successfully Started IPaaS Flow [439a28bd-8845-4c6d-b9dc-1eef89ff0088]

The "Set exception end date to 3 months from now" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

The following actions were performed:

No Errors Encountered
Changed Exception End Date from "Nothing" to "11/20/2025".
Evaluated the "Exception end date not set?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were met.
Changed Percent Complete from "0 %" to "100 %".
Evaluated the "Secops?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were met.
Evaluated the "IAM?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were not met.
Evaluated the "This is not a renewal" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were met.

Approved the "Unit Head Acceptance of Risk" step in the "Security Policy Exception" workflow.

Mitigations have been put in place to reduce the surface area. Processes to replace the systems are progressing.

Approved the "SepOps Risk Assessment and Approval of Security Exception Request" step in the "Security Policy Exception" workflow.

Firewall rules set on firewall to allow only needed/approved access to and from host. Implicit deny rules set below approved traffic. 

Sam Newell is upgrading these nodes to proxmox and will let operations team know when project is complete. These hosts are set for decommission.

Firewall rules put in place 8/19 between 10-11 AM. 

Rules put in place

Working with Sam 8/4 3 PM
Evaluated the "SecOps Exception?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were met.
Evaluated the "IAM Exception?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were not met.

The "Change ticket status to In Process, assign to implementation group" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

The following actions were performed:

No Errors Encountered

Changed Status from "On Hold" to "In Process".

Internal ticket update
Changed Computed Assessment Recommendation from "Nothing" to "Requires Review".

The "Set computed approval to Requires Review" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

Successfully Started IPaaS Flow [439a28bd-8845-4c6d-b9dc-1eef89ff0088]
Evaluated the "Score between 90 and 16?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were met.
Evaluated the "Is approval score > 90?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were not met.

The "Compute assessment score" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

The following actions were performed:

No Errors Encountered
Changed Computed Assessment Score from "Nothing" to "43".
Evaluated the "Computing Assessment?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were met.

Approved the "Unit Head Approval to begin Security Policy Exception Request" step in the "Security Policy Exception" workflow.

Mitigations include virtual machines running on hypervisor are limited to specific users, access to esxi is internal only.
The current findings for the hypervisors were reviewed, mitigations have been applied for impact for relevant high findings, of the remaining findings none were found to have a high probability of occurrence and impact. These systems are in the process of being re-imaged over the next 6 months to supported hypervisors.
The "Add contacts to ticket" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.
Added Michael Evans as a contact for this service request.

The "Add assets to ticket, if they exist" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

Successfully Started IPaaS Flow [9e2a4fae-95f6-4667-b08b-6b83342d377a]
Evaluated the "Jumping to a specific part of workflow?" step's conditions for this service request and determined they were not met.

The "Set status to On Hold, pending Approvals, and set IT Pro Group" IPaaS flow step completed successfully.

The following actions were performed:

No Errors Encountered

Changed Status from "New" to "On Hold".
Changed Goes Off Hold from "Nothing" to "Never".

Internal ticket update

Changed Internal Responsibility from "Nothing" to "IT-Security Operations".
Changed IT Professional from "Nothing" to "ITPRO-B&E".
